page: Vultr vcg-a40-12c-60g-24vram is a Cloud GPU server configured with a fractional NVIDIA Ampere A40 GPU. This instance allocates 0.5 of a physical A40 GPU, providing 24 GB of dedicated VRAM. The system is powered by an Intel x86_64 processor with 12 shared vCPUs and is equipped with 60.0 GB of system memory, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 5.0 GB per vCPU.

For local storage, the server includes a bundled 1110 GB NVMe SSD, offering high-speed read and write capabilities directly on the host. Network connectivity is supported by one complimentary public IPv4 address. Because the CPU allocation is shared, this instance is designed for workloads that require substantial GPU acceleration and memory capacity but do not demand constant, dedicated single-core CPU performance.

This hardware profile is qualitatively cost-efficient for projects needing significant GPU memory without the expense of a full, dedicated GPU card. The 24 GB of VRAM and 60.0 GB of system RAM make it suitable for mid-sized machine learning inference, data science workflows, 3D rendering, and video transcoding tasks where fractional GPU resources provide a balanced resource-to-cost ratio.
description: Vultr vcg-a40-12c-60g-24vram is a Cloud GPU server designed for workloads requiring GPU acceleration with a balanced system resource profile. It features a fractional NVIDIA Ampere A40 GPU providing 24 GB of VRAM, paired with 12 shared Intel x86_64 vCPUs and 60.0 GB of system memory. Local storage is supported by a bundled 1110 GB NVMe SSD, and the instance includes one complimentary public IPv4 address. The shared CPU allocation and fractional GPU configuration offer a qualitatively cost-efficient entry point for GPU-accelerated tasks without the overhead of a full dedicated accelerator. This server is suited for machine learning inference, data processing, and rendering workloads that benefit from high VRAM and fast local NVMe storage.

tagline: A fractional GPU server featuring an NVIDIA A40 with twenty-four gigabytes of VRAM and fast local NVMe storage.
